original: This ancient long laser rifle looks to have seen a long use life made all the more harrowing by the collection of haphazard modifications bolted on by its owner. The outside of heavily pitted projection barrel is still straight in spite of the lashed-on battery packs meant to replace a power cell that’s more corrosion than metal. Its sights are missing. The last owner replaced them with an encrypted camera HUD link that didn’t survive your battle.\n\nNevertheless, it shoots straighter than a pistol and plenty hot. A faded logo reveals that it was once something known as a “MaxLaz Rifle” - a product of MaxCorp. Even out here, you can’t get away from Uncle Max...
